## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component / feature

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) for any public API changes
- [ ] Stories are updated / added (Storybook)
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Playground page is updated if a component prop changed
- [ ] Accessibility considerations documented in component or playground page
- [ ] Figma Code Connect updated if props changed (`@switch/react` or `@switch/react-native`)
